name: alpha
description: OMP-style local harness as a VS Code chat participant using VS Code/Copilot model access.

chatParticipants.name: a
chatParticipants.description: OMP-style local coding harness with read/bash/edit/search/find/web_search/write/lsp/bitbucket/task/eval/todo tools.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review code changes with Alpha reviewer agents.

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Create OMP-style atomic git commits from current changes.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Enter OMP-style read-only plan mode before implementation.

commands.name: plan-review
commands.description: Show the current Alpha plan mode review state.

commands.name: blueprint
commands.description: Run Blueprint-style Q&A before generating an Alpha plan.

commands.name: blueprint-generate
commands.description: Generate an Alpha plan from the active blueprint.

commands.name: goal
commands.description: Manage an OMP-style persistent Alpha goal.

commands.name: compact
commands.description: Compact Alpha chat history into a persistent summary.

commands.name: context
commands.description: Show Alpha prompt token usage for the current Copilot model.

commands.title: Alpha: Inspect VS Code LM Tools

alpha.search.maxResults.description: Maximum search matches returned by the local search tool.

alpha.search.contextBefore.description: Default context lines emitted before each search match.

alpha.search.contextAfter.description: Default context lines emitted after each search match.

alpha.search.maxVisibleBytes.description: Maximum visible bytes returned by search before full output is stored as an artifact.

alpha.search.maxFiles.description: Maximum workspace files considered by the local search tool.

alpha.find.maxVisibleBytes.description: Maximum visible bytes returned by find before full output is stored as an artifact.

alpha.webSearch.provider.description: Provider for Alpha web_search. duckduckgo_html uses https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/ without an API key; set disabled when public web search is not approved.

alpha.read.maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes read from a single file.

alpha.read.defaultLimit.description: Maximum lines returned for a file read without an explicit selector.

alpha.bash.maxVisibleBytes.description: Maximum visible bytes returned by bash before full output is stored as an artifact.

alpha.bash.interceptDedicatedToolCommand.description: Block bash commands that should use Alpha read/search/find/edit/write tools.

alpha.bash.stripTrailingHeadTail.description: Strip trailing head/tail pipes because Alpha stores full output artifacts.

alpha.write.formatOnWrite.description: Run VS Code document formatting after write when a formatter is available.

alpha.write.diagnosticsOnWrite.description: Include VS Code diagnostics for a file after write.

alpha.edit.diagnosticsOnEdit.description: Include VS Code diagnostics for touched files after edit.

alpha.session.maxHistoryTurns.description: Maximum prior VS Code chat turns replayed into an Alpha model request.

alpha.session.retentionDays.description: Automatically prune persisted Alpha sessions that have not been touched for this many days.

alpha.session.storagePath.description: File path for persisted Alpha session state. Relative paths resolve from the first workspace folder; use an absolute path for a stable VDI-backed profile location.

alpha.context.showUsage.description: Show Alpha outgoing prompt token usage at the start of each response.

alpha.context.autoCompact.description: Automatically compact Alpha chat history when outgoing prompt usage crosses the configured threshold.

alpha.context.compactionThresholdPercent.description: OMP-style Alpha-side compaction threshold as a percentage of the current VS Code Copilot model max input tokens.

alpha.context.compactionThresholdTokens.description: Fixed Alpha-side compaction token threshold. Set -1 to use alpha.context.compactionThresholdPercent.

alpha.context.targetPercent.description: After compaction, drop oldest replayed chat turns until Alpha's outgoing prompt is below this percentage of the current model input window.

alpha.context.midTurnAutoCompact.description: Run OMP-style in-flight compaction during long tool loops after completed tool exchanges push context above the compaction threshold.

alpha.context.midTurnKeepRecentTokens.description: Recent in-flight tool-loop token budget kept verbatim when Alpha compacts older completed tool exchanges. Mirrors OMP's token-oriented keepRecentTokens shape.

alpha.goal.continuationHint.description: Show a short hint when an Alpha response ends while an OMP-style goal is still active. Natural follow-ups like continue or keep going resume the same goal.

alpha.tools.discoveryMode.description: Tool discovery mode. off advertises all enabled Alpha public tools. all advertises only essential tools; search_tool_bm25 support will activate discoverable tools in a later phase.

alpha.tools.approvalMode.description: OMP-style approval mode. always-ask allows read tier and prompts for write/exec; write allows read/write and prompts for exec; yolo allows all unless per-tool policy overrides.

alpha.tools.approval.description: Per-tool OMP-style approval policy overrides, keyed by tool name, with values allow, deny, or prompt.

alpha.tools.maxRequests.description: Maximum model requests Alpha may make during one main @a turn before forcing a final no-tool response.

alpha.tools.maxRepeatedToolBatches.description: Maximum identical consecutive tool-call batches allowed before Alpha stops the loop and asks the model to answer without tools.

alpha.bitbucket.baseUrl.description: Bitbucket Server/Data Center base URL. If empty, Alpha infers from git remote origin or uses Bitbucket Cloud.

alpha.bitbucket.tokenEnv.description: Environment variable containing a Bitbucket bearer token or app password.

alpha.bitbucket.usernameEnv.description: Environment variable containing a Bitbucket username for basic auth.

alpha.bitbucket.passwordEnv.description: Environment variable containing a Bitbucket password or app password for basic auth.

alpha.bitbucket.codeSearchPathTemplates.description: Optional Bitbucket Server/Data Center code-search endpoint templates. Templates may be absolute URLs or base-url-relative paths and may use {baseUrl}, {project}, {workspace}, {slug}, {repo}, {query}, and {limit}. Alpha tries these before built-in Server/Data Center defaults.

alpha.task.batch.description: Use OMP-style batch task shape with context and tasks[]. Runtime still accepts legacy flat assignment calls for stale transcripts.

alpha.task.async.description: Run task subagents in the background and expose them through the job tool.

alpha.task.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum task subagents running concurrently in one Alpha task call.

alpha.task.maxRecursionDepth.description: Maximum OMP-style nested task depth. 0 disables child task spawning; -1 removes the cap. Plan-mode subagents still cannot spawn children.

alpha.task.maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum visible bytes from one subagent result before full output is stored as an artifact.

alpha.task.maxOutputLines.description: Maximum visible lines from one subagent result before full output is stored as an artifact.

alpha.task.softRequestBudgetOverride.description: Override OMP-style soft subagent request budgets. 0 uses built-in defaults: explore/quick_task 40, default 90.

alpha.eval.py.description: Enable Python eval cells when python3 is available.
